untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires candlestick pattern recognition (Bearish Belt Hold formation) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators. The specific candlestick pattern shape, opening gap confirmation logic, and exact stop/target placement rules are marked AUTHOR_SILENT in source material and require visual pattern detection not available in indicator-based rules.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture core belt hold mechanics: opening higher than previous close (gap up confirmation) with bearish reversal intent. Exit condition uses basic reversal logic (close > open). Actual pattern detection would require candlestick shape analysis unavailable in allowed indicator set. Success rates (68-69%) suggest pattern-specific recognition needed beyond price/volume indicators.
